description: Open-source geopolitical intelligence platform publishing weekly early-warning monitors across democracy, macroeconomics, FIMI/cognitive warfare, AI governance, environmental risks, conflict escalation, and European strategic autonomy.
purpose: Polycrisis intelligence for asymmetric risk — monitoring systemic threats that compound across domains. Each monitor runs a weekly cycle: automated collection, AI-assisted reasoning, adversarial review, and structured publication. All data is published under CC BY 4.0.

monitors.name: World Democracy Monitor
monitors.focus: Electoral integrity, judicial independence, civil society, press freedom

monitors.name: Global Macro Monitor
monitors.focus: Macro-economic stress, trade disruption, fiscal contagion, supply chain risk

monitors.name: FIMI & Cognitive Warfare Monitor
monitors.focus: Foreign information manipulation, cognitive warfare campaigns, platform responses

monitors.name: European Strategic Autonomy Monitor
monitors.focus: EU defence, tech sovereignty, energy independence, institutional resilience

monitors.name: Artificial Intelligence Monitor
monitors.focus: AI governance, compute concentration, regulatory divergence, safety frameworks

monitors.name: Environmental Risks Monitor
monitors.focus: Climate tipping points, biodiversity loss, resource scarcity, environmental policy

monitors.name: Strategic Conflict Escalation Monitor
monitors.focus: Active conflicts, escalation trajectories, theatre-level risk, false-flag indicators

last_updated_note: This file is static. For live publication dates, see each monitor's report-latest.json.
